title: myroxylon ciliatifolium
intro: Myroxylon ciliatifolium, also known as Palo Santo, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America, its name translating to "holy wood" in Spanish. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, respiratory problems, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Palo Santo include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of depression and fatigue. Palo Santo is typically prepared in herbal form through the use of essential oils extracted from its wood, which can be used in aromatherapy, or as a tea made from its leaves and bark.
